APA_HIGH_FREQUENCY_STATUS - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Report parking-related high-frequency signals 上报泊车相关的高频信号 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float[] property type [0]:前转向装置的小齿轮转向角 [1]:前转向装置的小齿轮转向角速度 [2]:方向盘扭矩 yifei2.zhang@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2025-08-12 10:00:33
APA_HMI_SHOW_PARKING_SPOT - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Display all details of the vehicle's parking status during parking 展示泊车时车辆的所有细节状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type [0]:驾驶员车门状态（0：关 1：开） [1]:副驾车门状态（0：关 1：开） [2]:左后车门状态（0：关 1：开） [3]:右后车门状态（0：关 1：开） [4]:引擎盖状态（0：关 1：开） [5]:后备箱状态（0：关 1：开） [6]:驾驶员外后折叠状态 [7]:乘客外后视镜折叠 [8]:刹车灯状态（0：关 1：开） [9]:左转向灯状态（0：关 1：开） [10]:右转向灯状态（0：关 1：开） [11]:远光灯状态（0：关 1：亮 2：错误亮起） [12]:近关灯状态（0：关 1：亮 2：错误亮起） [13]:转向角度 hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 17:20:20

APA_IS_DISPLAY - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
After starting APA, obtain whether the corresponding data flow status is in APA mode, and ADCU sends PrkglmgDispReq signal to DHU 启动APA后，获取对应数据流状态是否为APA模式，ADCU发送PrkglmgDispReq信号到DHU ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 10:17:02
APA_LOW_SPEED_EXPLORE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Low speed active exploration function switch 低速主动探索功能开关，DHU下发LSDANotifPushRec控制是否开启此功能，ADCU反馈LSDANotifPushResp通知DHU当前低速主动探索开关状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 17:15:59

Deprecated.
使用 APA_OBSTACLE_DETECTION_SWITCH，是一样的功能 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
APA_PARKING_DOCK_DISABLE_REQUEST - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
In the R gear and system control mode, the dock bar is grayed out and cannot be clicked.
APA_PARKING_IN_CONTROL - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA parking in function APA泊入功能,DHU下发信号PrkglnOrOutAndCncl = 1 控制ADCU状态机切换为泊入动作 ;ADCU反馈PrkgBtnStsDispGroupPrkgin值用于通知DHU泊入按钮的展示状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APABtnStatus property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 11:21:13
APA_PARKING_INTERRUPT_CONTROL - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
After the interruption of APA parking, DHU sends a signal PrkgintrptReldBtn to ADCU to control the subsequent parking status; ADCU provides feedback on the DrrAsscSysDisp signal, which is used as a status button to display the current parking progress APA泊车中断后的控制，DHU下发信号PrkgintrptReldBtn到ADCU，控制后续泊车状态 ；ADCU反馈DrvrAsscSysDisp信号，用于展示当前泊车进度的状态按钮 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.ParkingInterruptStatus property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 10:48:13
APA_PARKING_OUT_CONTROL - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA parking out function APA泊出功能，DHU下发信号PrkglnOrOutAndCncl = 2 控制ADCU状态机切换为泊出动作 ；ADCU反馈PrkgBtnStsDispGroupPrkgout值用于通知DHU泊出按钮的展示状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APABtnStatus property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 11:23:14
APA_PARKING_OUT_DIRECTION - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA parking out direction selection APA泊出方向选择，左/右泊出方向以座椅的area来区分下发 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APABtnStatus property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 11:29:08
APA_PARKING_PROGRESS_AND_STATUS - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Current parking status and progress 当前泊车的状态与进度 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 例：[0]:当前泊车进度 ；[1]:挡位 ；[2]：泊车方向显示时间 hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 10:58:17
APA_PARKING_TRAVELED_DISTANCE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA single step travel distance, ADCU feedback ValtPrkgL1SpecialPromptDisp to DHU APA单步行驶距离,ADCU反馈ValtPrkgL1SpecialPromptDisp到DHU，DHU根据信号的值，以及bit位callback给应用参数 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 例：[0]:是否显示单步剩余距离 ；[1]:距离值 hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 11:17:47
APA_PDC_MUTE_SWITCH - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Parking assist: PDC mute switch 泊车辅助：PDC静音开关 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-31 10:22:52
APA_PREMOTE_PARKING_CONTROL - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
V446K has remote parking, and after selecting a parking space, two parking methods will appear: automatic parking on the car's infotainment system and remote parking on the mobile phone.
APA_PREMOTE_PARKING_DISTANCE_CONTROL - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
The distance setting required for remote parking 遥控泊车需要行驶的距离设置，ADCU反馈RemStraightPrkgAssiSelnReqResp值用于展示当前遥控泊车的形式距离；DHU下发RemStraightPrkgAssiSelnReq控制需要遥控的距离 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APAParkingDistance property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 17:07:01
APA_SELECT_VIR_PARKING_SPACE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Parking space selection, the value of AutPrkgSlotNrReq issued by DHU is the parking space ID value, and there is no feedback signal.
APA_SETTINGS_STATUS - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA setting button status acquisition, ADCU feedback PrkgBtnTsDispset value is used to control the display status of this icon APA设置按钮状态获取，ADCU反馈PrkgBtnStsDispset值用于控制此图标的展示状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APABtnStatus property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 16:59:13
APA_STATUS_MARKET - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
The approximate state of the vehicle when parked 泊车时车辆的大致状态集合 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 例：[0]:泊车指示1 ；[1]:泊车指示2 ；[2]:水平左泊出状态 ；[3]:水平右泊出状态 ；[4]:车门状态 ；[5]:车锁状态 ；[6]:左右舵（0代表左、1代表右）；[7]:Camera状态 ；[8]:Rcta状态 hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 11:04:36
APA_SWITCH_HELP_VOICE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Parking assist sound mode switching 泊车辅助声音模式切换 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APAVoiceMode property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 17:11:41
APA_SWITCH_TO_AVM - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
The APA application switches internally to AVM, and DHU sends a signal PrkgFctSwt to ADCU, changing the data flow from APA to AVM; ADCU provides feedback on the current button display status to DHU APA应用内部跳转至AVM，DHU下发信号PrkgFctSwt到ADCU，改变数据流从APA变为AVM；ADCU反馈当前按钮展示状态到DHU ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APABtnStatus property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 10:52:25
APA_TOAST_NOTIFICATION - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA displays classical Chinese prompts internally, and ADCU sends PrkgFctDiDisp signal to DHU to display abnormal prompts APA内部展示文言提示，ADCU发送PrkgFctDiDisp信号到DHU用于展示异常的提示 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 反馈对应弹窗的ID hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 10:19:52
APA_VIEW_TYPE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA/TBA View Type，currently, there is a switch between front and rear views APA/TBA视图类型，目前有前后视图切换 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APAViewType property type yifei2.zhang@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2025-10-24 10:30:19
APA_VOICE_BROADCAST - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
APA voice broadcast APA内部的语音播报 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 信号对应的文言ID hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-03 11:15:12

DISPLAY_APA - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
Auto Parking Assist，自动泊车辅助
DISPLAY_AVM - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
Around View Monitor, 全景环视系统
DISPLAY_AVP - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
Automated Valet Parking，自动代客泊车
DISPLAY_HPA - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
Home-zone Parking Assist，记忆泊车辅助
DISPLAY_LSDA - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
Low Speed Driving Assist，低速辅助驾驶助手
DISPLAY_OFF - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IAvm.DisplayMode
退出
DISPLAY_OFF - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
未显示/退出
DISPLAY_RPA - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
Remote Parking Assist，遥控泊车辅助系统，一般为APA应用功能的一部分
DISPLAY_RPAP - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus
Remote Parking Assist的一种，一般为APA应用功能的一部分
DISPLAY_RSPA - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.DisplayStatus

DPS_UPDATE_AUTHORIZED_TIME - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IADAS
DPS start time setting (Driver Performance Support) DPS设置开始时间 (驾驶员状态监测)，原AdaptAPI为IADAS#SETTING_FUNC_DPS_UPDATE_AUTHORIZED_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type [0]代表年(四位，如2024) [1]代表月（最多两位，不补0） [2]代表日（最多两位，不补0） deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-30 15:41:25

ELECTRONIC_AIR_OUTLET_DIRECTION_ADJUST - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IHvac
Electric air outlet direction adjustment for air conditioner 空调电动出风口方向调节(原adaptApi接口HVAC_FUNC_ELECTRICAL_AIR_VENT_POS) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 三个值。第一个代表x轴横向位置坐标；第二个代表y轴纵向位置坐标；第三个代表z轴位置坐标； jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-30 17:40:57
ELECTRONIC_AIR_OUTLET_DIRECTION_ADJUST - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IHvac

ELECTRONIC_AIR_OUTLET_SWITCH - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IHvac

ENGINE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo
The remaining mileage before the next maintenance，Positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_MILEAGE 发动机保养剩余里程，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_MILEAGE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 km mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:27:05

ENGINE_MAINTENANCE_TIME - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo
The remaining time before the next maintenance, positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_TIME 发动机保养剩余时间，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 day mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:28:11

GNSS_LOCATOR_AUTH_CYCLE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.GNSS
Location upload cloud authorization days 定位上传云端授权天数，单位：天，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_CAR_TCAM_LOCATOR_AUTH_CYCLE, 获取支持哪些天数用ICarConfig.getSupportValues()，返回示例： 90 180 360 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 10:59:25
GNSS_LOCATOR_UPDATE_AUTH_TIME - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.GNSS
Starting time of authorization for uploading to the cloud location 定位上传云端的授权开始时间，示例：Integer[] startTime = {2024, 8, 21}，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_CAR_TCAM_LOCATOR_UPDATE_AUTH_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 11:03:06
GNSS_UPLOAD_LOCATION_SWITCH - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.GNSS
Vehicle Location Information Upload Switch: When the switch is turned on, the vehicle location information will be uploaded to the cloud for vehicle tracking purposes.

HPA_ACTION_CONTROL - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
HPA entry and exit control HPA 进入和退出控制 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2025-01-13 17:49:17
HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IPAS
HMI displays vehicle status, original ID is PAS_FUNC_HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE HMI显示车辆状态，原 ID 为PAS_FUNC_HPA_CAR_CONFIG_HMI_CAR_STATE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 状态数组，每个下标代表一个类别的状态，不同项目下标代表含义不尽相同，使用前需自行确认。0 表示无效。 mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-17 15:27:35
HPA_CONFIRM_DEXTINATION_BTN - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
HPA Arrival Destination Button HPA 到达目的地按钮 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAPA.APABtnStatus property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2025-01-15 10:15:41
HPA_CONFIRM_POP - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA
Passive entry into HPA confirmation pop 被动进入HPA确认弹框，callback的值代表显示/隐藏，set下发的值代表弹框的确认/取消按钮 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2025-01-13 17:55:21

HPA cruise/remaining time display hpa巡航/剩余时间显示 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 第一位：0:Not display, 1:更新巡航时间，2:巡航完成总用时，3:巡航剩余时间 第二位：巡航/剩余时间的具体值 hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2025-01-17 15:02:13

MASSAGE_SWITCH - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ISeat
Seat massage switch 座椅按摩开关，原ID：HVAC_FUNC_SEAT_MASSAGE_SWITCH ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-24 14:46:16
MAX_EV_ENDURANCE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICharging
For hybrid vehicles, activating the extreme pure electric range can appropriately extend the pure electric range，original ID : CHARGE_FUNC_MAXEV_SWITCH 极致纯电续航，对于混动车来说，激活极致纯电续航后可以适当延长纯电续航里程, 原 ID 为 CHARGE_FUNC_MAXEV_SWITCH ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-15 17:25:09

Constant for INightMode.setNightMode(int) and INightMode.getNightMode(): automatically switch night mode on and off based on the time.
MODE_NIGHT_INVALID - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.display.nightmode.INightMode
Constant for INightMode.setNightMode(int) and INightMode.getNightMode(): night mode value invalid.
MODE_NIGHT_NO - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.display.nightmode.INightMode
Constant for INightMode.setNightMode(int) and INightMode.getNightMode(): never run in night mode.
MODE_NIGHT_SUNLIGHT_SENSOR - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.display.nightmode.INightMode
Constant for INightMode.setNightMode(int) and INightMode.getNightMode(): automatically switch night mode on and off based on sunlight sensor.
MODE_NIGHT_SUNRISE_AND_SUNSET - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.display.nightmode.INightMode
Constant for INightMode.setNightMode(int) and INightMode.getNightMode(): automatically switch night mode on and off based on the sunlight time.
MODE_NIGHT_YES - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.display.nightmode.INightMode
Constant for INightMode.setNightMode(int) and INightMode.getNightMode(): always run in night mode.

SCREEN_ON - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IDisplay
screen switch<br/> 屏幕开关<br/> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type DIM(仪表屏) use with VehicleAreaSeat#SEAT_ROW_1_LEFT CSD(中控屏屏) use with VehicleAreaSeat#SEAT_ROW_1_CENTER PSD(乘客屏) use with VehicleAreaSeat#SEAT_ROW_1_RIGHT RSD(后排屏) use with VehicleAreaSeat#SEAT_ROW_2_LEFT|VehicleAreaSeat#SEAT_ROW_2_RIGHT RFDM(吸顶屏) use with VehicleAreaSeat#SEAT_ROW_2_CENTER deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2025-01-03 19:03:05

setAutoUpgradeStatus(boolean, long) - Method in interface ecarx.carext.update.ota.IOtaInstall
设置夜间自动更新开关并设置对应的时间 Set a time clock and a automatic upgrade switch for OTA Update 注意：由于 TCAM 只以预约时间作为实际安装时间，因此在使用此接口后需要再次调用IOtaInstall.setScheduledTime(long)

STATE_RESERVE_WAITING - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ICharging.ChargingPlugState

STATE_SLOW_CHARGING_CONNECTED - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ICharging.ChargingPlugState

STATE_UNKNOWN - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ICharging.ChargingPlugState

STATE_WAITING - Static variable in annotation type ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ICharging.ChargingPlugState
这种状态是交流充电线或放电线插入，但没有完全连接，所以不能判断当前插入的电缆是充电还是放电。 对于HMI接口，可以用来显示有电缆插入，如电缆指示灯

Two step unlock switch, press the unlock button to unlock the driver's door first, and press the unlock button again to unlock the entire vehicle 两步解锁开关，开启后按解锁键先解锁主驾车门，再次按解锁键才解锁全车，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_TWOSTEP_UNLOCKING ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 11:24:00

VEHICLE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo
The remaining mileage before the next maintenance, positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID TYPE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE 整车保养剩余里程，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 km mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:18:27
VEHICLE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE_CYCLE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo
vehicle maintenance mileage cycle, 10000km etc 整车保养里程周期, 比如 一万公里一保养 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC Integer property type unit:km deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-11-11 11:33:53
VEHICLE_MAINTENANCE_STATE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo
Vehicle maintenance state 整车保养状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 具体值由业务约定 mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:14:45
VEHICLE_MAINTENANCE_TIME - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo
The remaining time before the next maintenance, positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID is TYPE_MAINTENANCE_TIME 整车保养剩余时间，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_MAINTENANCE_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 day mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:20:17
VEHICLE_MAINTENANCE_TIME_CYCLE - Static variable in interface ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo
vehicle manitenance time cycle, one year(365 days) etc 整车保养周期，比如一年(365天) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC Integer property type unit:day deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-11-11 11:32:25
